column2: This sheet is left intentionally blank. Please insert or copy over your proposal onto this tab. You may also link the file on this tab, if in a different format (Word/Pdf). Please provide a comprehensive cost for all identified deliverables, including implementation. If any items included in the proposal are not included within the total amount being proposed, please identify each item and provide the corresponding cost. Itemize non-recurring and recurring costs. As stated earlier, vendor agrees that its responsive materials (including pricing) will remain valid and applicable for a minimum of six months (or 180 days) from the date vendor's response is received by MGRC.
